programmes.show_name: Help Me Make It Through the Night!
programmes.show_description: Non-stop love songs, back to back all night, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.
We didn't yet call them Power Ballads, but some masters of the genre - Boston, Toto & Whitesnake - were already at it! Simes has twenty-five power pop love songs and ballads - in order.

programmes.show_name: Help Me Make It Through the Night!
programmes.show_description: Non-stop love songs, back to back all night, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.
Three hours of up-tempo feel-good songs about love - spanning the whole decade! Get your dancin' shoes on with The Jacksons, Abba, Elton, Anita Ward and John Paul Young.
20 massive UK Number 1 songs - all about love and lust! Some happy, some sad, but all of them sung from the heart.

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
Sixty minutes of back-to-back 1970 Number 1s - from Simon & Garfunkel and Elvis Presley to Lee Marvin and Freda Payne. With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.
A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles UK for 1976 - can you believe these were all hits 50 years ago? And if you thought Abba were at number 1 - think again!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1976!
Pat Man selects 30 chart toppers of the 70s that have probably slipped your mind! Expect lesser remembered hits from Mud, Dr Hook, David Cassidy, Lena Martell & Brotherhood of Man.
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1972!
The hottest party starters from pop's golden decade. From disco to soul to glam to pure pop to new wave.
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Get down to Studio 54 with Abba on songwriting duties, the Bee Gees on production, Chic's string section and Pat Sharp on rhythm guitar!
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!
From the early days when soul gained that disco beat in 1973, to the turn of the decade when Blondie and Diana Ross got in on the act! Simon Bates is your dancefloor host!
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!

programmes.show_name: Earth Wind & Fire v Sunshine Band!
programmes.show_description: 45 minutes of funk & disco from 2 of the biggest feelgood bands of the decade!
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!
45 minutes of back to back number 1s from 1971 - with Middle of the Road, Mungo Jerry, Diana Ross & Benny Hill. With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1971!
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1972!
2 decades of movie moments and classic pop hits from the 70s & 80s. Direct from the red carpet - Limahl is ready for his close-up!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
50 songs about brothers, sisters, mothers, fathers, boys, girls, lovers & friends. Not forgetting a Russian mystic, the inventor of the telephone & a speedy milkman!
Experience the magic of the 70s, where every beat was a spell and every song a timeless enchantment!
Simon Bates with a celebration of a decade - the 50 biggest pure pop hits of the 70s. He's got a bucketload of Boney M, oodles of the Osmonds and an armful of ABBA!
